title: Smoky Flaky Australian Bryndza Skewers
description: A low‑carb, nostalgic Aussie skewer featuring smoky, flaky bryndza cheese cubes that melt to a golden crisp on the grill. Serve hot as a savory snack or light lunch.

ingredients.name: Wooden or metal skewers
ingredients.notes: soak wooden skewers 30 min before use

instructions: Preheat grill or grill pan to medium‑high heat (180‑200 °C).
Brush the skewer sticks lightly with olive oil to prevent sticking.
In a small bowl combine smoked paprika, sea salt, black pepper, minced garlic, dried oregano, and lemon zest.
Toss the bryndza cubes in the spice mixture until evenly coated.
Thread the seasoned bryndza cubes onto the skewers, leaving a small gap between pieces.
Place the skewers on the preheated grill and cook, turning every 2–3 minutes, until the cheese edges are golden and a slight flare appears (about 6–8 minutes total).
Remove from heat, drizzle a few drops of extra‑virgin olive oil, and serve immediately.
